title: RBI releases Master Direction on Unique Identifiers in Financial Markets
description: Legal Entity Identifier (LEI) and Unique Transaction Identifier (UTI) are key data elements identified globally for reporting of OTC derivative transactions. While LEI uniquely identifies the counterparties to a transaction, UTI serves as a single unique reference number for the transaction. Over the years, the Reserve Bank has issued instructions mandating reporting of LEI for transactions in the financial markets regulated by the Reserve Bank.
